name: AgentFlow Energy Manager
summary: Designs daily rhythms, work-rest balance, and energy-aware routines inside a Personal Operating System for Health.
description: AgentFlow Energy Manager helps users understand and shape their physical and mental energy across the day. It builds realistic work-rest rhythms, recovery windows, focus blocks, movement breaks, and supportive lifestyle routines within a Personal Operating System for Health.
use_cases: Plan a day around energy peaks and dips
Build recovery windows into the schedule
conversation_starters: Help me plan my day around my energy levels.
I crash every afternoon. Build a better routine.
Create a sustainable work-rest rhythm for me.
Map my day into focus blocks and recovery blocks.
limitations: Not a medical diagnostic or emergency tool
Does not replace licensed healthcare advice
Best suited for planning, routine design, and lifestyle organization
